title: pilosella aurantiaca subsp. porphyromelana
intro: Pilosella aurantiaca subsp. porphyromelana, also known as the rusty rosette or purple-stemmed yellow sedge, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Pilosella aurantiaca subsp. porphyromelana are believed to provide relief from digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being, making it a popular herbal remedy. It can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used to support the health of the digestive system, immune system, and cardiovascular system.
